messages.content: 你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。

请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：在此基础上，新增一个AI对手。 规则：1.撞击对方自己会死亡。 2.死亡后3s 复活且只有初始长度。  3. 游戏一共2分钟， 时间结束后长度更长的一方获胜。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

prompt: 你是专业的游戏开发 AI 助手。
gameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
  <title>双蛇对决 - AI 对手</title>
  <style>
    html, body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      background: #111;
      color: #fff;
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      overflow: hidden;
      touch-action: none;
    }
    canvas {
      max-width: 100%;
      height: auto;
      display: block;
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1d2533, #0d1118);
      box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="game"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('game');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
canvas.width = 360;
canvas.height = 640;

const W = canvas.width;
const H = canvas.height;

const GRID = 20;
const COLS = W / GRID;
const ROWS = H / GRID;

const GAME_DURATION = 120000;
const RESPAWN_DELAY = 3000;
const MOVE_INTERVAL = 110;
const INITIAL_LENGTH = 4;
const FOOD_COUNT = 5;

let gameState = 'ready';
let gameStartTime = 0;
let lastTick = 0;
let lastFrame = 0;
let winnerText = '';
let particles = [];
let foods = [];
let flashTimer = 0;

function randInt(min, max) {
  return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
}
function clamp(v, min, max) {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v));
}
function sameCell(a, b) {
  return a.x === b.x && a.y === b.y;
}
function cellCenter(cell) {
  return { x: cell.x * GRID + GRID / 2, y: cell.y * GRID + GRID / 2 };
}
function dirVec(dir) {
  if (dir === 'up') return { x: 0, y: -1 };
  if (dir === 'down') return { x: 0, y: 1 };
  if (dir === 'left') return { x: -1, y: 0 };
  return { x: 1, y: 0 };
}
function opposite(a, b) {
  return (a === 'up' && b === 'down') || (a === 'down' && b === 'up') ||
         (a === 'left' && b === 'right') || (a === 'right' && b === 'left');
}

function makeSnake(name, color, headColor, startX, startY, dir, isAI = false) {
  const body = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < INITIAL_LENGTH; i++) {
    body.push({ x: startX - i * dirVec(dir).x, y: startY - i * dirVec(dir).y });
  }
  return {
    name,
    color,
    headColor,
    body,
    dir,
    nextDir: dir,
    grow: 0,
    alive: true,
    respawnAt: 0,
    kills: 0,
    foods: 0,
    isAI,
    spawn: { x: startX, y: startY, dir }
  };
}

let player = makeSnake('玩家', '#49e36d', '#a8ffba', 5, 8, 'right', false);
let ai = makeSnake('AI', '#ff6565', '#ffc0c0', COLS - 6, ROWS - 9, 'left', true);

function resetGame() {
  player = makeSnake('玩家', '#49e36d', '#a8ffba', 5, 8, 'right', false);
  ai = makeSnake('AI', '#ff6565', '#ffc0c0', COLS - 6, ROWS - 9, 'left', true);
  particles = [];
  foods = [];
  flashTimer = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < FOOD_COUNT; i++) spawnFood();
  gameStartTime = performance.now();
  lastTick = gameStartTime;
  lastFrame = gameStartTime;
  winnerText = '';
  gameState = 'playing';
}

function occupiedByAny(cell, includeDead = false) {
  const snakes = [player, ai];
  for (const s of snakes) {
    if (!includeDead && !s.alive) continue;
    for (const seg of s.body) {
      if (sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

function spawnFood() {
  let tries = 0;
  while (tries < 500) {
    const cell = { x: randInt(1, COLS - 2), y: randInt(3, ROWS - 2) };
    const exists = foods.some(f => sameCell(f, cell));
    if (!exists && !occupiedByAny(cell, true)) {
      foods.push({
        x: cell.x,
        y: cell.y,
        pulse: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
        value: 1
      });
      return;
    }
    tries++;
  }
}

function addParticles(cell, color, count = 12) {
  const c = cellCenter(cell);
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    const a = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    const sp = Math.random() * 2.8 + 0.5;
    particles.push({
      x: c.x,
      y: c.y,
      vx: Math.cos(a) * sp,
      vy: Math.sin(a) * sp,
      life: 25 + Math.random() * 20,
      color
    });
  }
}

function killSnake(snake, bySnake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;
  snake.alive = false;
  snake.respawnAt = performance.now() + RESPAWN_DELAY;
  addParticles(snake.body[0], snake.color, 24);
  flashTimer = 10;
  if (bySnake) bySnake.kills++;
}

function tryRespawn(snake) {
  if (snake.alive) return;
  if (performance.now() < snake.respawnAt) return;

  const { x, y, dir } = snake.spawn;
  const fresh = [];
  const dv = dirVec(dir);
  for (let i = 0; i < INITIAL_LENGTH; i++) {
    fresh.push({ x: x - i * dv.x, y: y - i * dv.y });
  }

  let ok = true;
  for (const c of fresh) {
    if (c.x < 0 || c.x >= COLS || c.y < 3 || c.y >= ROWS) ok = false;
    if (occupiedByAny(c, false)) ok = false;
  }

  if (!ok) return;

  snake.body = fresh;
  snake.dir = dir;
  snake.nextDir = dir;
  snake.grow = 0;
  snake.alive = true;
  addParticles(snake.body[0], snake.headColor, 16);
}

function setPlayerDirection(dir) {
  if (!player.alive || gameState !== 'playing') return;
  if (!opposite(player.dir, dir)) player.nextDir = dir;
}

window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') {
    if (e.code === 'Space' || e.key === 'Enter') resetGame();
  }
  if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' || e.key === 'w' || e.key === 'W') setPlayerDirection('up');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === 's' || e.key === 'S') setPlayerDirection('down');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') setPlayerDirection('left');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') setPlayerDirection('right');
});

let touchStartX = 0;
let touchStartY = 0;
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  const t = e.touches[0];
  touchStartX = t.clientX;
  touchStartY = t.clientY;
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') resetGame();
}, { passive: false });

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
  const t = e.changedTouches[0];
  const dx = t.clientX - touchStartX;
  const dy = t.clientY - touchStartY;
  if (Math.abs(dx) < 12 && Math.abs(dy) < 12) return;
  if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) {
    setPlayerDirection(dx > 0 ? 'right' : 'left');
  } else {
    setPlayerDirection(dy > 0 ? 'down' : 'up');
  }
}, { passive: false });

canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') resetGame();
});

function cellBlockedForAI(cell) {
  if (cell.x < 0 || cell.x >= COLS || cell.y < 3 || cell.y >= ROWS) return true;
  for (const seg of player.body) if (player.alive && sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
  for (const seg of ai.body) if (ai.alive && sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
  return false;
}

function aiChooseDirection() {
  if (!ai.alive) return;

  const dirs = ['up', 'down', 'left', 'right'].filter(d => !opposite(ai.dir, d));
  const head = ai.body[0];

  let targetFood = null;
  let bestDist = Infinity;
  for (const f of foods) {
    const d = Math.abs(f.x - head.x) + Math.abs(f.y - head.y);
    if (d < bestDist) {
      bestDist = d;
      targetFood = f;
    }
  }

  function scoreDir(d) {
    const v = dirVec(d);
    const next = { x: head.x + v.x, y: head.y + v.y };
    if (cellBlockedForAI(next)) return -99999;

    let score = 0;

    if (targetFood) {
      const curDist = Math.abs(targetFood.x - head.x) + Math.abs(targetFood.y - head.y);
      const newDist = Math.abs(targetFood.x - next.x) + Math.abs(targetFood.y - next.y);
      score += (curDist - newDist) * 10;
    }

    const enemyHead = player.body[0];
    if (player.alive) {
      const dEnemy = Math.abs(enemyHead.x - next.x) + Math.abs(enemyHead.y - next.y);
      if (dEnemy <= 1 && ai.body.length >= player.body.length) score += 8;
      if (dEnemy <= 1 && ai.body.length < player.body.length) score -= 6;
    }

    const around = [
      {x: next.x+1, y: next.y}, {x: next.x-1, y: next.y},
      {x: next.x, y: next.y+1}, {x: next.x, y: next.y-1}
    ];
    let free = 0;
    for (const c of around) if (!cellBlockedForAI(c)) free++;
    score += free * 2;

    const centerBias = -Math.abs(next.x - COLS/2) * 0.15 - Math.abs(next.y - ROWS/2) * 0.1;
    score += centerBias;
    score += Math.random() * 0.5;

    return score;
  }

  let bestDir = ai.dir;
  let bestScore = -Infinity;
  for (const d of dirs) {
    const s = scoreDir(d);
    if (s > bestScore) {
      bestScore = s;
      bestDir = d;
    }
  }
  ai.nextDir = bestDir;
}

function moveSnake(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return null;
  snake.dir = snake.nextDir;
  const v = dirVec(snake.dir);
  const newHead = { x: snake.body[0].x + v.x, y: snake.body[0].y + v.y };
  snake.body.unshift(newHead);
  if (snake.grow > 0) snake.grow--;
  else snake.body.pop();
  return newHead;
}

function handleFood(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;
  const head = snake.body[0];
  for (let i = 0; i < foods.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, foods[i])) {
      snake.grow += foods[i].value;
      snake.foods += foods[i].value;
      addParticles(head, '#ffd54a', 10);
      foods.splice(i, 1);
      spawnFood();
      return;
    }
  }
}

function hitWall(head) {
  return head.x < 0 || head.x >= COLS || head.y < 3 || head.y >= ROWS;
}

function hitSelf(snake) {
  const head = snake.body[0];
  for (let i = 1; i < snake.body.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, snake.body[i])) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function hitOther(head, otherSnake) {
  if (!otherSnake.alive) return false;
  for (let i = 0; i < otherSnake.body.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, otherSnake.body[i])) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function updateLogic() {
  if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

  const now = performance.now();
  const elapsed = now - gameStartTime;
  if (elapsed >= GAME_DURATION) {
    gameState = 'ended';
    const pLen = player.body.length;
    const aLen = ai.body.length;
    if (pLen > aLen) winnerText = '时间到，玩家获胜！';
    else if (aLen > pLen) winnerText = '时间到，AI 获胜！';
    else winnerText = '时间到，平局！';
    return;
  }

  tryRespawn(player);
  tryRespawn(ai);

  aiChooseDirection();

  const pHead = moveSnake(player);
  const aHead = moveSnake(ai);

  let playerDead = false;
  let aiDead = false;

  if (player.alive && pHead) {
    if (hitWall(pHead) || hitSelf(player) || hitOther(pHead, ai)) playerDead = true;
  }
  if (ai.alive && aHead) {
    if (hitWall(aHead) || hitSelf(ai) || hitOther(aHead, player)) aiDead = true;
  }

  if (player.alive && ai.alive && pHead && aHead && sameCell(pHead, aHead)) {
    playerDead = true;
    aiDead = true;
  }

  if (playerDead) killSnake(player, ai.alive ? ai : null);
  if (aiDead) killSnake(ai, player.alive ? player : null);

  if (player.alive) handleFood(player);
  if (ai.alive) handleFood(ai);

  while (foods.length < FOOD_COUNT) spawnFood();
}

function updateParticles(dt) {
  for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const p = particles[i];
    p.x += p.vx * dt * 0.06;
    p.y += p.vy * dt * 0.06;
    p.vx *= 0.988;
    p.vy *= 0.988;
    p.life -= dt * 0.06;
    if (p.life <= 0) particles.splice(i, 1);
  }
  if (flashTimer > 0) flashTimer -= dt * 0.02;
}

function drawGrid() {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let x = 0; x <= W; x += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + 0.5, 56);
    ctx.lineTo(x + 0.5, H);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (let y = 60; y <= H; y += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y + 0.5);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y + 0.5);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawArena() {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 60, W, H - 60);

  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.strokeRect(1, 61, W - 2, H - 62);
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawFood(time) {
  foods.forEach((f, i) => {
    const cx = f.x * GRID + GRID / 2;
    const cy = f.y * GRID + GRID / 2;
    const pulse = 0.85 + 0.18 * Math.sin(time * 0.006 + f.pulse + i);
    const r = 6 * pulse;

    ctx.save();
    ctx.shadowColor = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.shadowBlur = 12;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff3b0';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx - 2, cy - 2, r * 0.42, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
}

function drawSnake(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;

  for (let i = snake.body.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const seg = snake.body[i];
    const x = seg.x * GRID;
    const y = seg.y * GRID;
    const isHead = i === 0;

    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = isHead ? snake.headColor : snake.color;
    ctx.shadowColor = isHead ? snake.headColor : snake.color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = isHead ? 10 : 4;

    const pad = isHead ? 2 : 3;
    roundRect(ctx, x + pad, y + pad, GRID - pad * 2, GRID - pad * 2, 6);
    ctx.fill();

    if (isHead) {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#111';
      const d = snake.dir;
      let ex1, ey1, ex2, ey2;
      if (d === 'right') {
        ex1 = x + 13; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 13;
      } else if (d === 'left') {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 7; ey2 = y + 13;
      } else if (d === 'up') {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 7;
      } else {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 13; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 13;
      }
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ex1, ey1, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ex2, ey2, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
  ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
  ctx.closePath();
}

function drawParticles() {
  particles.forEach(p => {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = Math.max(0, p.life / 40);
    ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
}

function drawHUD(now) {
  const leftLen = player.body.length;
  const rightLen = ai.body.length;
  const remain = Math.max(0, GAME_DURATION - (now - gameStartTime));
  const sec = Math.ceil(remain / 1000);
  const mm = String(Math.floor(sec / 60)).padStart(2, '0');
  const ss = String(sec % 60).padStart(2, '0');

  ctx.save();
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(7,10,16,0.88)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, 56);

  ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
  ctx.font = 'bold 14px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  ctx.fillText(`玩家 长度:${leftLen} 击杀:${player.kills}`, 10, 21);
  ctx.font = '12px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = player.alive ? '#cfe' : '#ffb3b3';
  ctx.fillText(player.alive ? '状态: 存活' : `复活: ${Math.max(0, Math.ceil((player.respawnAt - now)/1000))}s`, 10, 40);

  ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
  ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.fillText(`${mm}:${ss}`, W / 2, 24);
  ctx.font = '11px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = '#bbb';
  ctx.fillText('2分钟内长度更长者获胜', W / 2, 42);

  ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
  ctx.font = 'bold 14px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'right';
  ctx.fillText(`AI 长度:${rightLen} 击杀:${ai.kills}`, W - 10, 21);
  ctx.font = '12px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = ai.alive ? '#fee' : '#ffb3b3';
  ctx.fillText(ai.alive ? '状态: 存活' : `复活: ${Math.max(0, Math.ceil((ai.respawnAt - now)/1000))}s`, W - 10, 40);
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawOverlay() {
  if (gameState === 'ready') {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.font = 'bold 28px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('双蛇对决', W / 2, 200);
    ctx.font = '16px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#cfd8dc';
    ctx.fillText('你 vs AI', W / 2, 235);
    ctx.font = '14px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('滑动或方向键控制绿色蛇', W / 2, 290);
    ctx.fillText('撞墙、撞自己、撞对方都会死亡', W / 2, 320);
    ctx.fillText('死亡 3 秒后复活，长度重置', W / 2, 350);
    ctx.fillText('2 分钟结束后，长度更长者获胜', W / 2, 380);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#49e36d';
    roundRect(ctx, 90, 450, 180, 48, 12);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#102114';
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('点击开始', W / 2, 481);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  if (gameState === 'ended') {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.55)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.font = 'bold 26px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('比赛结束', W / 2, 220);
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.fillText(winnerText, W / 2, 260);

    ctx.font = '16px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
    ctx.fillText(`玩家最终长度：${player.body.length}`, W / 2, 320);
    ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
    ctx.fillText(`AI 最终长度：${ai.body.length}`, W / 2, 350);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#49e36d';
    roundRect(ctx, 90, 430, 180, 48, 12);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#102114';
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('再来一局', W / 2, 461);
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

function render(now) {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

  drawArena();
  drawGrid();
  drawFood(now);
  drawSnake(player);
  drawSnake(ai);
  drawParticles();
  if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'ended') drawHUD(now);

  if (flashTimer > 0) {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${Math.min(0.18, flashTimer * 0.02)})`;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  drawOverlay();
}

function frame(now) {
  const dt = now - lastFrame;
  lastFrame = now;

  if (gameState === 'playing') {
    while (now - lastTick >= MOVE_INTERVAL) {
      updateLogic();
      lastTick += MOVE_INTERVAL;
    }
  }

  updateParticles(dt);
  render(now);
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
}

requestAnimationFrame((t) => {
  lastTick = t;
  lastFrame = t;
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
rawGameCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
  <title>双蛇对决 - AI 对手</title>
  <style>
    html, body {
      margin: 0;
      padding: 0;
      background: #111;
      color: #fff;
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      overflow: hidden;
      touch-action: none;
    }
    canvas {
      max-width: 100%;
      height: auto;
      display: block;
      margin: 0 auto;
      background: linear-gradient(180deg, #1d2533, #0d1118);
      box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="game"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('game');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
canvas.width = 360;
canvas.height = 640;

const W = canvas.width;
const H = canvas.height;

const GRID = 20;
const COLS = W / GRID;
const ROWS = H / GRID;

const GAME_DURATION = 120000;
const RESPAWN_DELAY = 3000;
const MOVE_INTERVAL = 110;
const INITIAL_LENGTH = 4;
const FOOD_COUNT = 5;

let gameState = 'ready';
let gameStartTime = 0;
let lastTick = 0;
let lastFrame = 0;
let winnerText = '';
let particles = [];
let foods = [];
let flashTimer = 0;

function randInt(min, max) {
  return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
}
function clamp(v, min, max) {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v));
}
function sameCell(a, b) {
  return a.x === b.x && a.y === b.y;
}
function cellCenter(cell) {
  return { x: cell.x * GRID + GRID / 2, y: cell.y * GRID + GRID / 2 };
}
function dirVec(dir) {
  if (dir === 'up') return { x: 0, y: -1 };
  if (dir === 'down') return { x: 0, y: 1 };
  if (dir === 'left') return { x: -1, y: 0 };
  return { x: 1, y: 0 };
}
function opposite(a, b) {
  return (a === 'up' && b === 'down') || (a === 'down' && b === 'up') ||
         (a === 'left' && b === 'right') || (a === 'right' && b === 'left');
}

function makeSnake(name, color, headColor, startX, startY, dir, isAI = false) {
  const body = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < INITIAL_LENGTH; i++) {
    body.push({ x: startX - i * dirVec(dir).x, y: startY - i * dirVec(dir).y });
  }
  return {
    name,
    color,
    headColor,
    body,
    dir,
    nextDir: dir,
    grow: 0,
    alive: true,
    respawnAt: 0,
    kills: 0,
    foods: 0,
    isAI,
    spawn: { x: startX, y: startY, dir }
  };
}

let player = makeSnake('玩家', '#49e36d', '#a8ffba', 5, 8, 'right', false);
let ai = makeSnake('AI', '#ff6565', '#ffc0c0', COLS - 6, ROWS - 9, 'left', true);

function resetGame() {
  player = makeSnake('玩家', '#49e36d', '#a8ffba', 5, 8, 'right', false);
  ai = makeSnake('AI', '#ff6565', '#ffc0c0', COLS - 6, ROWS - 9, 'left', true);
  particles = [];
  foods = [];
  flashTimer = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < FOOD_COUNT; i++) spawnFood();
  gameStartTime = performance.now();
  lastTick = gameStartTime;
  lastFrame = gameStartTime;
  winnerText = '';
  gameState = 'playing';
}

function occupiedByAny(cell, includeDead = false) {
  const snakes = [player, ai];
  for (const s of snakes) {
    if (!includeDead && !s.alive) continue;
    for (const seg of s.body) {
      if (sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

function spawnFood() {
  let tries = 0;
  while (tries < 500) {
    const cell = { x: randInt(1, COLS - 2), y: randInt(3, ROWS - 2) };
    const exists = foods.some(f => sameCell(f, cell));
    if (!exists && !occupiedByAny(cell, true)) {
      foods.push({
        x: cell.x,
        y: cell.y,
        pulse: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
        value: 1
      });
      return;
    }
    tries++;
  }
}

function addParticles(cell, color, count = 12) {
  const c = cellCenter(cell);
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    const a = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    const sp = Math.random() * 2.8 + 0.5;
    particles.push({
      x: c.x,
      y: c.y,
      vx: Math.cos(a) * sp,
      vy: Math.sin(a) * sp,
      life: 25 + Math.random() * 20,
      color
    });
  }
}

function killSnake(snake, bySnake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;
  snake.alive = false;
  snake.respawnAt = performance.now() + RESPAWN_DELAY;
  addParticles(snake.body[0], snake.color, 24);
  flashTimer = 10;
  if (bySnake) bySnake.kills++;
}

function tryRespawn(snake) {
  if (snake.alive) return;
  if (performance.now() < snake.respawnAt) return;

  const { x, y, dir } = snake.spawn;
  const fresh = [];
  const dv = dirVec(dir);
  for (let i = 0; i < INITIAL_LENGTH; i++) {
    fresh.push({ x: x - i * dv.x, y: y - i * dv.y });
  }

  let ok = true;
  for (const c of fresh) {
    if (c.x < 0 || c.x >= COLS || c.y < 3 || c.y >= ROWS) ok = false;
    if (occupiedByAny(c, false)) ok = false;
  }

  if (!ok) return;

  snake.body = fresh;
  snake.dir = dir;
  snake.nextDir = dir;
  snake.grow = 0;
  snake.alive = true;
  addParticles(snake.body[0], snake.headColor, 16);
}

function setPlayerDirection(dir) {
  if (!player.alive || gameState !== 'playing') return;
  if (!opposite(player.dir, dir)) player.nextDir = dir;
}

window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') {
    if (e.code === 'Space' || e.key === 'Enter') resetGame();
  }
  if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' || e.key === 'w' || e.key === 'W') setPlayerDirection('up');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === 's' || e.key === 'S') setPlayerDirection('down');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') setPlayerDirection('left');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') setPlayerDirection('right');
});

let touchStartX = 0;
let touchStartY = 0;
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  const t = e.touches[0];
  touchStartX = t.clientX;
  touchStartY = t.clientY;
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') resetGame();
}, { passive: false });

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
  const t = e.changedTouches[0];
  const dx = t.clientX - touchStartX;
  const dy = t.clientY - touchStartY;
  if (Math.abs(dx) < 12 && Math.abs(dy) < 12) return;
  if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) {
    setPlayerDirection(dx > 0 ? 'right' : 'left');
  } else {
    setPlayerDirection(dy > 0 ? 'down' : 'up');
  }
}, { passive: false });

canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') resetGame();
});

function cellBlockedForAI(cell) {
  if (cell.x < 0 || cell.x >= COLS || cell.y < 3 || cell.y >= ROWS) return true;
  for (const seg of player.body) if (player.alive && sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
  for (const seg of ai.body) if (ai.alive && sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
  return false;
}

function aiChooseDirection() {
  if (!ai.alive) return;

  const dirs = ['up', 'down', 'left', 'right'].filter(d => !opposite(ai.dir, d));
  const head = ai.body[0];

  let targetFood = null;
  let bestDist = Infinity;
  for (const f of foods) {
    const d = Math.abs(f.x - head.x) + Math.abs(f.y - head.y);
    if (d < bestDist) {
      bestDist = d;
      targetFood = f;
    }
  }

  function scoreDir(d) {
    const v = dirVec(d);
    const next = { x: head.x + v.x, y: head.y + v.y };
    if (cellBlockedForAI(next)) return -99999;

    let score = 0;

    if (targetFood) {
      const curDist = Math.abs(targetFood.x - head.x) + Math.abs(targetFood.y - head.y);
      const newDist = Math.abs(targetFood.x - next.x) + Math.abs(targetFood.y - next.y);
      score += (curDist - newDist) * 10;
    }

    const enemyHead = player.body[0];
    if (player.alive) {
      const dEnemy = Math.abs(enemyHead.x - next.x) + Math.abs(enemyHead.y - next.y);
      if (dEnemy <= 1 && ai.body.length >= player.body.length) score += 8;
      if (dEnemy <= 1 && ai.body.length < player.body.length) score -= 6;
    }

    const around = [
      {x: next.x+1, y: next.y}, {x: next.x-1, y: next.y},
      {x: next.x, y: next.y+1}, {x: next.x, y: next.y-1}
    ];
    let free = 0;
    for (const c of around) if (!cellBlockedForAI(c)) free++;
    score += free * 2;

    const centerBias = -Math.abs(next.x - COLS/2) * 0.15 - Math.abs(next.y - ROWS/2) * 0.1;
    score += centerBias;
    score += Math.random() * 0.5;

    return score;
  }

  let bestDir = ai.dir;
  let bestScore = -Infinity;
  for (const d of dirs) {
    const s = scoreDir(d);
    if (s > bestScore) {
      bestScore = s;
      bestDir = d;
    }
  }
  ai.nextDir = bestDir;
}

function moveSnake(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return null;
  snake.dir = snake.nextDir;
  const v = dirVec(snake.dir);
  const newHead = { x: snake.body[0].x + v.x, y: snake.body[0].y + v.y };
  snake.body.unshift(newHead);
  if (snake.grow > 0) snake.grow--;
  else snake.body.pop();
  return newHead;
}

function handleFood(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;
  const head = snake.body[0];
  for (let i = 0; i < foods.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, foods[i])) {
      snake.grow += foods[i].value;
      snake.foods += foods[i].value;
      addParticles(head, '#ffd54a', 10);
      foods.splice(i, 1);
      spawnFood();
      return;
    }
  }
}

function hitWall(head) {
  return head.x < 0 || head.x >= COLS || head.y < 3 || head.y >= ROWS;
}

function hitSelf(snake) {
  const head = snake.body[0];
  for (let i = 1; i < snake.body.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, snake.body[i])) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function hitOther(head, otherSnake) {
  if (!otherSnake.alive) return false;
  for (let i = 0; i < otherSnake.body.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, otherSnake.body[i])) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function updateLogic() {
  if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

  const now = performance.now();
  const elapsed = now - gameStartTime;
  if (elapsed >= GAME_DURATION) {
    gameState = 'ended';
    const pLen = player.body.length;
    const aLen = ai.body.length;
    if (pLen > aLen) winnerText = '时间到，玩家获胜！';
    else if (aLen > pLen) winnerText = '时间到，AI 获胜！';
    else winnerText = '时间到，平局！';
    return;
  }

  tryRespawn(player);
  tryRespawn(ai);

  aiChooseDirection();

  const pHead = moveSnake(player);
  const aHead = moveSnake(ai);

  let playerDead = false;
  let aiDead = false;

  if (player.alive && pHead) {
    if (hitWall(pHead) || hitSelf(player) || hitOther(pHead, ai)) playerDead = true;
  }
  if (ai.alive && aHead) {
    if (hitWall(aHead) || hitSelf(ai) || hitOther(aHead, player)) aiDead = true;
  }

  if (player.alive && ai.alive && pHead && aHead && sameCell(pHead, aHead)) {
    playerDead = true;
    aiDead = true;
  }

  if (playerDead) killSnake(player, ai.alive ? ai : null);
  if (aiDead) killSnake(ai, player.alive ? player : null);

  if (player.alive) handleFood(player);
  if (ai.alive) handleFood(ai);

  while (foods.length < FOOD_COUNT) spawnFood();
}

function updateParticles(dt) {
  for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const p = particles[i];
    p.x += p.vx * dt * 0.06;
    p.y += p.vy * dt * 0.06;
    p.vx *= 0.988;
    p.vy *= 0.988;
    p.life -= dt * 0.06;
    if (p.life <= 0) particles.splice(i, 1);
  }
  if (flashTimer > 0) flashTimer -= dt * 0.02;
}

function drawGrid() {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let x = 0; x <= W; x += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + 0.5, 56);
    ctx.lineTo(x + 0.5, H);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (let y = 60; y <= H; y += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y + 0.5);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y + 0.5);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawArena() {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 60, W, H - 60);

  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.strokeRect(1, 61, W - 2, H - 62);
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawFood(time) {
  foods.forEach((f, i) => {
    const cx = f.x * GRID + GRID / 2;
    const cy = f.y * GRID + GRID / 2;
    const pulse = 0.85 + 0.18 * Math.sin(time * 0.006 + f.pulse + i);
    const r = 6 * pulse;

    ctx.save();
    ctx.shadowColor = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.shadowBlur = 12;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff3b0';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx - 2, cy - 2, r * 0.42, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
}

function drawSnake(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;

  for (let i = snake.body.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const seg = snake.body[i];
    const x = seg.x * GRID;
    const y = seg.y * GRID;
    const isHead = i === 0;

    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = isHead ? snake.headColor : snake.color;
    ctx.shadowColor = isHead ? snake.headColor : snake.color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = isHead ? 10 : 4;

    const pad = isHead ? 2 : 3;
    roundRect(ctx, x + pad, y + pad, GRID - pad * 2, GRID - pad * 2, 6);
    ctx.fill();

    if (isHead) {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#111';
      const d = snake.dir;
      let ex1, ey1, ex2, ey2;
      if (d === 'right') {
        ex1 = x + 13; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 13;
      } else if (d === 'left') {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 7; ey2 = y + 13;
      } else if (d === 'up') {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 7;
      } else {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 13; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 13;
      }
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ex1, ey1, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ex2, ey2, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
  ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
  ctx.closePath();
}

function drawParticles() {
  particles.forEach(p => {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = Math.max(0, p.life / 40);
    ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
}

function drawHUD(now) {
  const leftLen = player.body.length;
  const rightLen = ai.body.length;
  const remain = Math.max(0, GAME_DURATION - (now - gameStartTime));
  const sec = Math.ceil(remain / 1000);
  const mm = String(Math.floor(sec / 60)).padStart(2, '0');
  const ss = String(sec % 60).padStart(2, '0');

  ctx.save();
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(7,10,16,0.88)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, 56);

  ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
  ctx.font = 'bold 14px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  ctx.fillText(`玩家 长度:${leftLen} 击杀:${player.kills}`, 10, 21);
  ctx.font = '12px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = player.alive ? '#cfe' : '#ffb3b3';
  ctx.fillText(player.alive ? '状态: 存活' : `复活: ${Math.max(0, Math.ceil((player.respawnAt - now)/1000))}s`, 10, 40);

  ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
  ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.fillText(`${mm}:${ss}`, W / 2, 24);
  ctx.font = '11px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = '#bbb';
  ctx.fillText('2分钟内长度更长者获胜', W / 2, 42);

  ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
  ctx.font = 'bold 14px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'right';
  ctx.fillText(`AI 长度:${rightLen} 击杀:${ai.kills}`, W - 10, 21);
  ctx.font = '12px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = ai.alive ? '#fee' : '#ffb3b3';
  ctx.fillText(ai.alive ? '状态: 存活' : `复活: ${Math.max(0, Math.ceil((ai.respawnAt - now)/1000))}s`, W - 10, 40);
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawOverlay() {
  if (gameState === 'ready') {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.font = 'bold 28px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('双蛇对决', W / 2, 200);
    ctx.font = '16px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#cfd8dc';
    ctx.fillText('你 vs AI', W / 2, 235);
    ctx.font = '14px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('滑动或方向键控制绿色蛇', W / 2, 290);
    ctx.fillText('撞墙、撞自己、撞对方都会死亡', W / 2, 320);
    ctx.fillText('死亡 3 秒后复活，长度重置', W / 2, 350);
    ctx.fillText('2 分钟结束后，长度更长者获胜', W / 2, 380);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#49e36d';
    roundRect(ctx, 90, 450, 180, 48, 12);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#102114';
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('点击开始', W / 2, 481);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  if (gameState === 'ended') {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.55)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.font = 'bold 26px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('比赛结束', W / 2, 220);
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.fillText(winnerText, W / 2, 260);

    ctx.font = '16px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
    ctx.fillText(`玩家最终长度：${player.body.length}`, W / 2, 320);
    ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
    ctx.fillText(`AI 最终长度：${ai.body.length}`, W / 2, 350);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#49e36d';
    roundRect(ctx, 90, 430, 180, 48, 12);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#102114';
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('再来一局', W / 2, 461);
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

function render(now) {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

  drawArena();
  drawGrid();
  drawFood(now);
  drawSnake(player);
  drawSnake(ai);
  drawParticles();
  if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'ended') drawHUD(now);

  if (flashTimer > 0) {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${Math.min(0.18, flashTimer * 0.02)})`;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  drawOverlay();
}

function frame(now) {
  const dt = now - lastFrame;
  lastFrame = now;

  if (gameState === 'playing') {
    while (now - lastTick >= MOVE_INTERVAL) {
      updateLogic();
      lastTick += MOVE_INTERVAL;
    }
  }

  updateParticles(dt);
  render(now);
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
}

requestAnimationFrame((t) => {
  lastTick = t;
  lastFrame = t;
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>

</head>

<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('game');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
canvas.width = 360;
canvas.height = 640;

const W = canvas.width;
const H = canvas.height;

const GRID = 20;
const COLS = W / GRID;
const ROWS = H / GRID;

const GAME_DURATION = 120000;
const RESPAWN_DELAY = 3000;
const MOVE_INTERVAL = 110;
const INITIAL_LENGTH = 4;
const FOOD_COUNT = 5;

let gameState = 'ready';
let gameStartTime = 0;
let lastTick = 0;
let lastFrame = 0;
let winnerText = '';
let particles = [];
let foods = [];
let flashTimer = 0;

function randInt(min, max) {
  return Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
}
function clamp(v, min, max) {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v));
}
function sameCell(a, b) {
  return a.x === b.x && a.y === b.y;
}
function cellCenter(cell) {
  return { x: cell.x * GRID + GRID / 2, y: cell.y * GRID + GRID / 2 };
}
function dirVec(dir) {
  if (dir === 'up') return { x: 0, y: -1 };
  if (dir === 'down') return { x: 0, y: 1 };
  if (dir === 'left') return { x: -1, y: 0 };
  return { x: 1, y: 0 };
}
function opposite(a, b) {
  return (a === 'up' && b === 'down') || (a === 'down' && b === 'up') ||
         (a === 'left' && b === 'right') || (a === 'right' && b === 'left');
}

function makeSnake(name, color, headColor, startX, startY, dir, isAI = false) {
  const body = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < INITIAL_LENGTH; i++) {
    body.push({ x: startX - i * dirVec(dir).x, y: startY - i * dirVec(dir).y });
  }
  return {
    name,
    color,
    headColor,
    body,
    dir,
    nextDir: dir,
    grow: 0,
    alive: true,
    respawnAt: 0,
    kills: 0,
    foods: 0,
    isAI,
    spawn: { x: startX, y: startY, dir }
  };
}

let player = makeSnake('玩家', '#49e36d', '#a8ffba', 5, 8, 'right', false);
let ai = makeSnake('AI', '#ff6565', '#ffc0c0', COLS - 6, ROWS - 9, 'left', true);

function resetGame() {
  player = makeSnake('玩家', '#49e36d', '#a8ffba', 5, 8, 'right', false);
  ai = makeSnake('AI', '#ff6565', '#ffc0c0', COLS - 6, ROWS - 9, 'left', true);
  particles = [];
  foods = [];
  flashTimer = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < FOOD_COUNT; i++) spawnFood();
  gameStartTime = performance.now();
  lastTick = gameStartTime;
  lastFrame = gameStartTime;
  winnerText = '';
  gameState = 'playing';
}

function occupiedByAny(cell, includeDead = false) {
  const snakes = [player, ai];
  for (const s of snakes) {
    if (!includeDead && !s.alive) continue;
    for (const seg of s.body) {
      if (sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

function spawnFood() {
  let tries = 0;
  while (tries < 500) {
    const cell = { x: randInt(1, COLS - 2), y: randInt(3, ROWS - 2) };
    const exists = foods.some(f => sameCell(f, cell));
    if (!exists && !occupiedByAny(cell, true)) {
      foods.push({
        x: cell.x,
        y: cell.y,
        pulse: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
        value: 1
      });
      return;
    }
    tries++;
  }
}

function addParticles(cell, color, count = 12) {
  const c = cellCenter(cell);
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    const a = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
    const sp = Math.random() * 2.8 + 0.5;
    particles.push({
      x: c.x,
      y: c.y,
      vx: Math.cos(a) * sp,
      vy: Math.sin(a) * sp,
      life: 25 + Math.random() * 20,
      color
    });
  }
}

function killSnake(snake, bySnake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;
  snake.alive = false;
  snake.respawnAt = performance.now() + RESPAWN_DELAY;
  addParticles(snake.body[0], snake.color, 24);
  flashTimer = 10;
  if (bySnake) bySnake.kills++;
}

function tryRespawn(snake) {
  if (snake.alive) return;
  if (performance.now() < snake.respawnAt) return;

  const { x, y, dir } = snake.spawn;
  const fresh = [];
  const dv = dirVec(dir);
  for (let i = 0; i < INITIAL_LENGTH; i++) {
    fresh.push({ x: x - i * dv.x, y: y - i * dv.y });
  }

  let ok = true;
  for (const c of fresh) {
    if (c.x < 0 || c.x >= COLS || c.y < 3 || c.y >= ROWS) ok = false;
    if (occupiedByAny(c, false)) ok = false;
  }

  if (!ok) return;

  snake.body = fresh;
  snake.dir = dir;
  snake.nextDir = dir;
  snake.grow = 0;
  snake.alive = true;
  addParticles(snake.body[0], snake.headColor, 16);
}

function setPlayerDirection(dir) {
  if (!player.alive || gameState !== 'playing') return;
  if (!opposite(player.dir, dir)) player.nextDir = dir;
}

window.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') {
    if (e.code === 'Space' || e.key === 'Enter') resetGame();
  }
  if (e.key === 'ArrowUp' || e.key === 'w' || e.key === 'W') setPlayerDirection('up');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowDown' || e.key === 's' || e.key === 'S') setPlayerDirection('down');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') setPlayerDirection('left');
  else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') setPlayerDirection('right');
});

let touchStartX = 0;
let touchStartY = 0;
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  const t = e.touches[0];
  touchStartX = t.clientX;
  touchStartY = t.clientY;
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') resetGame();
}, { passive: false });

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
  const t = e.changedTouches[0];
  const dx = t.clientX - touchStartX;
  const dy = t.clientY - touchStartY;
  if (Math.abs(dx) < 12 && Math.abs(dy) < 12) return;
  if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) {
    setPlayerDirection(dx > 0 ? 'right' : 'left');
  } else {
    setPlayerDirection(dy > 0 ? 'down' : 'up');
  }
}, { passive: false });

canvas.addEventListener('click', () => {
  if (gameState === 'ready' || gameState === 'ended') resetGame();
});

function cellBlockedForAI(cell) {
  if (cell.x < 0 || cell.x >= COLS || cell.y < 3 || cell.y >= ROWS) return true;
  for (const seg of player.body) if (player.alive && sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
  for (const seg of ai.body) if (ai.alive && sameCell(seg, cell)) return true;
  return false;
}

function aiChooseDirection() {
  if (!ai.alive) return;

  const dirs = ['up', 'down', 'left', 'right'].filter(d => !opposite(ai.dir, d));
  const head = ai.body[0];

  let targetFood = null;
  let bestDist = Infinity;
  for (const f of foods) {
    const d = Math.abs(f.x - head.x) + Math.abs(f.y - head.y);
    if (d < bestDist) {
      bestDist = d;
      targetFood = f;
    }
  }

  function scoreDir(d) {
    const v = dirVec(d);
    const next = { x: head.x + v.x, y: head.y + v.y };
    if (cellBlockedForAI(next)) return -99999;

    let score = 0;

    if (targetFood) {
      const curDist = Math.abs(targetFood.x - head.x) + Math.abs(targetFood.y - head.y);
      const newDist = Math.abs(targetFood.x - next.x) + Math.abs(targetFood.y - next.y);
      score += (curDist - newDist) * 10;
    }

    const enemyHead = player.body[0];
    if (player.alive) {
      const dEnemy = Math.abs(enemyHead.x - next.x) + Math.abs(enemyHead.y - next.y);
      if (dEnemy <= 1 && ai.body.length >= player.body.length) score += 8;
      if (dEnemy <= 1 && ai.body.length < player.body.length) score -= 6;
    }

    const around = [
      {x: next.x+1, y: next.y}, {x: next.x-1, y: next.y},
      {x: next.x, y: next.y+1}, {x: next.x, y: next.y-1}
    ];
    let free = 0;
    for (const c of around) if (!cellBlockedForAI(c)) free++;
    score += free * 2;

    const centerBias = -Math.abs(next.x - COLS/2) * 0.15 - Math.abs(next.y - ROWS/2) * 0.1;
    score += centerBias;
    score += Math.random() * 0.5;

    return score;
  }

  let bestDir = ai.dir;
  let bestScore = -Infinity;
  for (const d of dirs) {
    const s = scoreDir(d);
    if (s > bestScore) {
      bestScore = s;
      bestDir = d;
    }
  }
  ai.nextDir = bestDir;
}

function moveSnake(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return null;
  snake.dir = snake.nextDir;
  const v = dirVec(snake.dir);
  const newHead = { x: snake.body[0].x + v.x, y: snake.body[0].y + v.y };
  snake.body.unshift(newHead);
  if (snake.grow > 0) snake.grow--;
  else snake.body.pop();
  return newHead;
}

function handleFood(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;
  const head = snake.body[0];
  for (let i = 0; i < foods.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, foods[i])) {
      snake.grow += foods[i].value;
      snake.foods += foods[i].value;
      addParticles(head, '#ffd54a', 10);
      foods.splice(i, 1);
      spawnFood();
      return;
    }
  }
}

function hitWall(head) {
  return head.x < 0 || head.x >= COLS || head.y < 3 || head.y >= ROWS;
}

function hitSelf(snake) {
  const head = snake.body[0];
  for (let i = 1; i < snake.body.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, snake.body[i])) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function hitOther(head, otherSnake) {
  if (!otherSnake.alive) return false;
  for (let i = 0; i < otherSnake.body.length; i++) {
    if (sameCell(head, otherSnake.body[i])) return true;
  }
  return false;
}

function updateLogic() {
  if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

  const now = performance.now();
  const elapsed = now - gameStartTime;
  if (elapsed >= GAME_DURATION) {
    gameState = 'ended';
    const pLen = player.body.length;
    const aLen = ai.body.length;
    if (pLen > aLen) winnerText = '时间到，玩家获胜！';
    else if (aLen > pLen) winnerText = '时间到，AI 获胜！';
    else winnerText = '时间到，平局！';
    return;
  }

  tryRespawn(player);
  tryRespawn(ai);

  aiChooseDirection();

  const pHead = moveSnake(player);
  const aHead = moveSnake(ai);

  let playerDead = false;
  let aiDead = false;

  if (player.alive && pHead) {
    if (hitWall(pHead) || hitSelf(player) || hitOther(pHead, ai)) playerDead = true;
  }
  if (ai.alive && aHead) {
    if (hitWall(aHead) || hitSelf(ai) || hitOther(aHead, player)) aiDead = true;
  }

  if (player.alive && ai.alive && pHead && aHead && sameCell(pHead, aHead)) {
    playerDead = true;
    aiDead = true;
  }

  if (playerDead) killSnake(player, ai.alive ? ai : null);
  if (aiDead) killSnake(ai, player.alive ? player : null);

  if (player.alive) handleFood(player);
  if (ai.alive) handleFood(ai);

  while (foods.length < FOOD_COUNT) spawnFood();
}

function updateParticles(dt) {
  for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const p = particles[i];
    p.x += p.vx * dt * 0.06;
    p.y += p.vy * dt * 0.06;
    p.vx *= 0.988;
    p.vy *= 0.988;
    p.life -= dt * 0.06;
    if (p.life <= 0) particles.splice(i, 1);
  }
  if (flashTimer > 0) flashTimer -= dt * 0.02;
}

function drawGrid() {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 1;
  for (let x = 0; x <= W; x += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(x + 0.5, 56);
    ctx.lineTo(x + 0.5, H);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  for (let y = 60; y <= H; y += GRID) {
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, y + 0.5);
    ctx.lineTo(W, y + 0.5);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawArena() {
  ctx.save();
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 60, W, H - 60);

  ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.12)';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  ctx.strokeRect(1, 61, W - 2, H - 62);
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawFood(time) {
  foods.forEach((f, i) => {
    const cx = f.x * GRID + GRID / 2;
    const cy = f.y * GRID + GRID / 2;
    const pulse = 0.85 + 0.18 * Math.sin(time * 0.006 + f.pulse + i);
    const r = 6 * pulse;

    ctx.save();
    ctx.shadowColor = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.shadowBlur = 12;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx, cy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff3b0';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(cx - 2, cy - 2, r * 0.42, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
}

function drawSnake(snake) {
  if (!snake.alive) return;

  for (let i = snake.body.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const seg = snake.body[i];
    const x = seg.x * GRID;
    const y = seg.y * GRID;
    const isHead = i === 0;

    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = isHead ? snake.headColor : snake.color;
    ctx.shadowColor = isHead ? snake.headColor : snake.color;
    ctx.shadowBlur = isHead ? 10 : 4;

    const pad = isHead ? 2 : 3;
    roundRect(ctx, x + pad, y + pad, GRID - pad * 2, GRID - pad * 2, 6);
    ctx.fill();

    if (isHead) {
      ctx.fillStyle = '#111';
      const d = snake.dir;
      let ex1, ey1, ex2, ey2;
      if (d === 'right') {
        ex1 = x + 13; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 13;
      } else if (d === 'left') {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 7; ey2 = y + 13;
      } else if (d === 'up') {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 7; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 7;
      } else {
        ex1 = x + 7; ey1 = y + 13; ex2 = x + 13; ey2 = y + 13;
      }
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ex1, ey1, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(ex2, ey2, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fill();
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
  ctx.beginPath();
  ctx.moveTo(x + r, y);
  ctx.arcTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + h, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x + w, y + h, x, y + h, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x, y + h, x, y, r);
  ctx.arcTo(x, y, x + w, y, r);
  ctx.closePath();
}

function drawParticles() {
  particles.forEach(p => {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = Math.max(0, p.life / 40);
    ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();
  });
}

function drawHUD(now) {
  const leftLen = player.body.length;
  const rightLen = ai.body.length;
  const remain = Math.max(0, GAME_DURATION - (now - gameStartTime));
  const sec = Math.ceil(remain / 1000);
  const mm = String(Math.floor(sec / 60)).padStart(2, '0');
  const ss = String(sec % 60).padStart(2, '0');

  ctx.save();
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(7,10,16,0.88)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, 56);

  ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
  ctx.font = 'bold 14px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'left';
  ctx.fillText(`玩家 长度:${leftLen} 击杀:${player.kills}`, 10, 21);
  ctx.font = '12px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = player.alive ? '#cfe' : '#ffb3b3';
  ctx.fillText(player.alive ? '状态: 存活' : `复活: ${Math.max(0, Math.ceil((player.respawnAt - now)/1000))}s`, 10, 40);

  ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
  ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'center';
  ctx.fillText(`${mm}:${ss}`, W / 2, 24);
  ctx.font = '11px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = '#bbb';
  ctx.fillText('2分钟内长度更长者获胜', W / 2, 42);

  ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
  ctx.font = 'bold 14px Arial';
  ctx.textAlign = 'right';
  ctx.fillText(`AI 长度:${rightLen} 击杀:${ai.kills}`, W - 10, 21);
  ctx.font = '12px Arial';
  ctx.fillStyle = ai.alive ? '#fee' : '#ffb3b3';
  ctx.fillText(ai.alive ? '状态: 存活' : `复活: ${Math.max(0, Math.ceil((ai.respawnAt - now)/1000))}s`, W - 10, 40);
  ctx.restore();
}

function drawOverlay() {
  if (gameState === 'ready') {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.45)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.font = 'bold 28px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('双蛇对决', W / 2, 200);
    ctx.font = '16px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#cfd8dc';
    ctx.fillText('你 vs AI', W / 2, 235);
    ctx.font = '14px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('滑动或方向键控制绿色蛇', W / 2, 290);
    ctx.fillText('撞墙、撞自己、撞对方都会死亡', W / 2, 320);
    ctx.fillText('死亡 3 秒后复活，长度重置', W / 2, 350);
    ctx.fillText('2 分钟结束后，长度更长者获胜', W / 2, 380);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#49e36d';
    roundRect(ctx, 90, 450, 180, 48, 12);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#102114';
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('点击开始', W / 2, 481);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  if (gameState === 'ended') {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.55)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.font = 'bold 26px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('比赛结束', W / 2, 220);
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd54a';
    ctx.fillText(winnerText, W / 2, 260);

    ctx.font = '16px Arial';
    ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
    ctx.fillText(`玩家最终长度：${player.body.length}`, W / 2, 320);
    ctx.fillStyle = ai.color;
    ctx.fillText(`AI 最终长度：${ai.body.length}`, W / 2, 350);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#49e36d';
    roundRect(ctx, 90, 430, 180, 48, 12);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle = '#102114';
    ctx.font = 'bold 20px Arial';
    ctx.fillText('再来一局', W / 2, 461);
    ctx.restore();
  }
}

function render(now) {
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

  drawArena();
  drawGrid();
  drawFood(now);
  drawSnake(player);
  drawSnake(ai);
  drawParticles();
  if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'ended') drawHUD(now);

  if (flashTimer > 0) {
    ctx.save();
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${Math.min(0.18, flashTimer * 0.02)})`;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  drawOverlay();
}

function frame(now) {
  const dt = now - lastFrame;
  lastFrame = now;

  if (gameState === 'playing') {
    while (now - lastTick >= MOVE_INTERVAL) {
      updateLogic();
      lastTick += MOVE_INTERVAL;
    }
  }

  updateParticles(dt);
  render(now);
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
}

requestAnimationFrame((t) => {
  lastTick = t;
  lastFrame = t;
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
